name: Hashbrowns
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the potatoes until tender, cool, peel and grate them on a cheese grater or in a food processor.
2. Boil the eggs until done, cool, peel and grate them.
3. Chop the onion and peppers.
4. Cut the kielbasa or sausage into bite-sized pieces.
5. Mix everything together in a bowl.
6. Line the bottom of a 5-quart ice cream pail or similar container with wax paper.
7. Spread out the amount needed for one breakfast on wax paper, top with another sheet of wax paper, and continue layering until done.
8. Freeze the layered mixture most of the way in the freezer, then take it out and separate the layers.
9. Put the layers back into the container, replace the lid, and freeze again.
10. To cook, remove one layer, place it on a non-stick griddle or skillet.
11. Cook on low with a lid over it for about 20 minutes, then turn the burner up to brown.
12. The hashbrowns are ready when you finish showering.
